title: Scrying the AMD GFX1250 LLVM Tea Leaves
excerpt: In just a few short days, AMD will be showing off their brand new MI400 series of Datacenter Accelerators at their Advancing AI event but before that event comes, we thought it would be fun to attempt to scry the tea leaves that are LLVM commits to see what we can ascertain about this next generation of AMD accelerator.
content_html:
In just a few short days, AMD will be showing off their brand new MI400 series of Datacenter Accelerators at their Advancing AI event but before that event comes, we thought it would be fun to attempt to scry the tea leaves that are LLVM commits to see what we can ascertain about this next generation of AMD accelerator.

LLVM currently has preliminary support for two new accelerators from AMD, under the codenames GFX1250 and GFX1251.

GFX1250 is an accelerator chip oriented at the machine learning market called MI455X and will be what powers the Helios rack. While the GFX1251 is oriented at the HPC market, named the MI430X and is projected by AMD to deliver over 200 TFLOPs of native double-precision compute.

We’ll focus on the GFX1250 for now though and save the GFX1251 for another day.

We’ll compare the architecture to the consumer variant, the previous generation of CDNA accelerators, and to some extent Nvidia’s Blackwell.

A curious note here is that while we know that these accelerators are not APUs, they are listed as such in LLVM.

The biggest similarity with the consumer architectures is that we now have a WGP (Workgroup Processor) that are built up from two pairs of two SIMD32 arrays, but there is also four SIMDs per CU just like there was in GCN and CDNA. This seeming discrepancy is because there is no longer any need for the software to separate the two CUs in the WGP and AMD seems to use the terms interchangeably.

This “change” is probably not as structural as it might at first seem and might not even exist in hardware, the changes in the caching hierarchy simply makes the distinction pointless for the compiler as there is now a shared vector L0 cache for the whole WGP.

GFX1250 operates only in Wave32 mode, unlike RDNA that can run in Wave64 in addition to Wave32 mode. Prior CDNA GPUs can only run in Wave64 mode and we can expect to see some oddness there from a performance engineering point of view when porting things to the new accelerators and a lot of kernels will have to be re-evaluated for the new architecture.

It also seems like GFX1250 can run 20 waves per SIMD, which is four more than RDNA4 can do.

We do not know if any of these characteristics are a sign for where AMD goes on their GPUs, but I personally guess that it is a sign of times to come and a future generation of AMD GPUs will be locked to Wave32 and the “WGP” as it currently exist goes the way of the dodo but it seems like this is not happening anytime soon.

Similarly to RDNA4 we now get “WMMA” support, unlike the older “MFMA” featured in CDNA and this is where most of the machine learning capabilities of the GFX1250 will come from and we’ll look into it more later.

The dynamic VGPR allocation feature that was heavily touted in RDNA4 is missing, which is a bit strange to me since I would imagine it is even more important for machine learning workloads that are under much higher register pressure due to working with whole tensors instead of just individual vectors or matrices. The mode-switch is still there but the instruction to allocate new registers is documented as a no-op.

One of the largest changes found in GFX125X is that each wave in a SIMD can now address up to 1024 Vector General Purpose Registers (VGPRs) from the Register File. This is a major improvement over prior CDNA generations where you had a split allocation of registers with up to 256 VGPRs and 256 Accumulation VGPRs, which can only be used by the matrix units, for a total of up to 512 registers allocated to a single wave at a time.

This is an even larger improvement over the register allocation behavior of the RDNA series of GPUs, RDNA can only allocate up to 256 registers to a single Wave with no allocation split. This is a major update that might at some point be part of a future generation GPU IP but I wouldn’t bet on it coming soon. We will just have to wait to see if the feature is going to stay locked to the Instinct line or if this ability to allocate up to 1024 registers to a single wave will make an appearance in the Radeon line up as well.

The maximum addressable local memory (LDS) is now 320kB per wavefront which is twice as much as CDNA4 and dwarfs the 64kB addressable in RDNA. But the actual LDS can actually be even larger, a major change in GFX125X is the merging of the LDS and vector L0 caches into what AMD is calling the WGP Cache (WGP$). While both nVidia and Intel have had a single structure for both cache and shared memory for a long time, AMD has been the odd vendor out with a split cache and LDS. GFX1250 now has a single 448KB structure that can be broken up into different allocations depending on what the compiler or programmer requests.

GFX1250 still supports packed fp32 operations allowing a single lane in the SIMD to process two fp32 operations at once just like CDNA2 and later, this practically means that when using packed instructions it has twice the vector width of RDNA.

It also inherits the more numerous and powerful SDMA units from CDNA.

It is notable that nVidia and Intel do have some vestigial graphics hardware left on their accelerators and GFX125x differs a little from their offerings on this front.

  • No export instructions and therefore no rasterizer (like CDNA)

  • No image (texture) instructions (like CDNA)

  • No BVH (raytracing) instructions (like CDNA)

  • No vector parameter interpolation instructions that are used to access and interpolate vertex data in pixel shaders (like CDNA)

  • No MTBUF (typed buffer) instructions are supported (unlike CDNA and RDNA3)

  • No MUBUF (untyped buffer) instructions are supported (unlike CDNA and RDNA)

  • No LDS parameter and parameter direct loads (like CDNA)

We’re seeing that this GFX125x is even more of a pure compute accelerator than even prior CDNA architectures with nearly all graphics features having been removed. This probably saves a little bit of die space and removes features no one will miss, so it makes a lot of sense to me.

The headline feature of the MI455X is its AI capabilities, and the tensor units are what powers that. This seems to be a best of both worlds situation where AMD is combining the simpler programming model from RDNA4 with the higher performance and capabilities of CDNA4.

On RDNA4 WMMA operations are M = N = K = 16 (matrices are 16x16) except for the 4-bit ones that have K = 32 (arguments are 16x32 or 32x16 and accumulated into 16x16).

GFX1250 keeps M = N = 16, but K instead is the same as it was on CDNA4. K = 4 for 64-bit and 32-bit floating-point elements, K = 32 for floating-point 16-bit elements, K = 64 for fixed-point 8-bit elements and K = 128 for floating-point 8-bit elements. Interestingly the i4 operations stay at RDNA4 level at K=32 and are no longer a very popular data format in large AI inference scenarios due to the adoption of MX floating point operations.

Unlike on RDNA4 the sparse versions of WMMA seem to do less work per instruction than the dense ones by keeping K the same.

RDNA4 supports the following matrix of formats for WMMA

While CDNA4 supports the following for MFMA

And GFX1250 seems to support all the datatypes that are found on both CDNA4 and RDNA4 except for fp64 which seems to be restricted to GFX1251, including the support of OCP MX-style scaling that was previously available solely on CDNA4.

In addition there’s new instructions that allow you to transpose submatrices in LDS to complement the ones already in RNDA4. The fp4/fp6 versions of these have their own feature flag, that might be a sign that these will show up on consumer GPUs or it is just a coincidence.

This seems to be AMD’s version of “Thread Block Clusters” that nVidia introduced in their Hopper architecture, and it seems like they allow you to schedule a cluster to a specific shader engine and seems to be a feature that will be available on future graphics hardware too.

In addition to allowing you to access the cluster information, AMD has also introduced cluster-level loads which allow you to write to the LDS of other workgroups within a cluster, similar or equivalent to multicast loads on Nvidia hardware.

Author’s Note: A claim that wasn’t substantiated about DSMEM was removed here.

GFX1250 adds support for cluster-level barriers, which is a feature that is essentially required to make use of clusters and is equivalent to the Nvidia feature of the same name.

In addition we’re getting intrinsics for barrier arrival, the equivalent of mbarrier.arrive in Nvidia PTX. AMD does seem to take this support one step further though by not just implementing barriers in hardware but also full monitors, allowing the wave to be notified if a specific cache line is evicted from the L2 cache.

It’s unclear what these exactly are intended to be useful for since Nvidia doesn’t have a direct equivalent already, but I guess GPU programmers will find a lot of good uses for these intrinsics.

In addition to the split barriers and barrier objects already added in RDNA4, it also supports 16 named barrier objects. These are likely added as a compatibility thing, since they have been around since Nvidia’s Tesla architecture from 2006.

AMD is adding hardware support for tanh, which is rare in traditional geometry but very common in neural networks as an activation function and in the solution of many differential equations.

But the whole unit seems to have been improved, they added bf16 support and the latency for fp32 operations have gone down from 9 cycles in RDNA4 to 8 cycles in GFX1250.

With GFX1250 we now have intrinsics to do 32x4B, 16x8B, and 8x16B atomic loads and store to global memory, the funky naming is because these are actually 128B atomic loads and stores, the first number implies how many lanes of each wavefront are involved in the atomic but the result is essentially 1, 2, or 4 complete 128B atomic memory operations.

At the hardware-level they aren’t special instructions but just a sequence of regular loads or stores that the hardware knows how to handle so that they end up on the bus correctly.

The first use-case for this that will pop into certain peoples minds is to use this to accelerate RPCS3’s Cell emulation, and while someone is obviously going to try and use it for that, there’s a bunch of use-cases for this. But a goal is likely to accelerate AMD’s equivalent to Nvidia’s Collective Communications Library (NCCL), creatively named ROCm Collective Communications Library, as explored in the paper Demystifying NCCL.

LL128 support was to some extent already enabled on CDNA but the format has now been changed to be equivalent to the Nvidia one instead of splitting into two 64B halves.

For technical reasons these operations are not available over PCIe but I assume these will be usable over CXL and UALink. Nvidia has a very similar limitation that it is only available in global memory or over NVLink.

Nvidia’s marketing name for this feature is the “Tensor Memory Accelerator”, and while this feature was already available to some extent in earlier CDNA iterations it has now gained more features especially related to tensors.

The basic version just allows you to load data from global memory into LDS without using the VGPRS.

While it isn’t completely clear to me exactly what capabilities are available to the tensor version since the types involved are opaque, the code isn’t totally obvious and the documentation isn’t completely clear. But Triton has some good documentation where the capabilities are enumerated. It is somewhat similar to Nvidia’s tcgen05.cp in capability except they transfer between global memory and LDS instead of between shared memory and tensor memory.

GFX1250 adds explicit prefetching of vector memory, and AMD has finally added this feature that is available on many CPUs that are old enough to vote. Nvidia has supported this since Fermi so it really isn’t that exciting.

Some people might think that this has been a curious omission for GPUs, but unlike CPUs we’re rarely starved for registers so we can load data early and we can use the many waves running on the same core to hide the latency.

But I can imagine that inference kernels can gain some minor performance from this so it makes sense to add now I guess.

On AMD GPUs and accelerators the hardware can most of the time figure out data dependencies automatically, but in certain cases you need to do it manually.

On GCN and by extension CDNA you had three counters that allowed you to wait on operations to be completed so that you could ensure that previous operations had been completed before continuing.

  • VM_CNT for vector memory operations.

    • Incremented when a vector-memory load is issued and decremented when the data is written to the VGPRs.

    • Incremented when a vector memory store is issued and decremented when the data is written to L2 cache.

    • Incremented when a sample or image instruction is issued and decremented when the data is returned to VGPRs.

  • LGKM_CNT for LDS, GDS, Konstant (scalar memory read), and Message instructions.

    • Incremented when a LDS or GDS load is issued and decremented when the data is written to the VGPRs.

    • Incremented when a LDS or GDS store is issued and decremented when the data is written to the LDS or GDS.

    • Incremented for every DWORD worth of scalar load issued and decremented again for every DWORD read from the scalar data cache (SMEM)

    • Incremented for every message send issued and decremented when the message is actually sent.

  • EXP_CNT for VGPR exports, this is a graphics feature used for passing things like vertex positions and color values between shaders. This exists in CDNA but isn’t used so we’re going to conveniently ignore this counter

The big issue here with the GCN/CDNA setup of these counters is that instructions of different types are returned out-of-order. And in the case of scalar loads they are also returned out-of-order even within the same instruction type.

This regretfully means that you are likely to need to insert more waits more than would otherwise be required, especially for scalar reads where waiting for the counter to reach zero is the only useful value.

So AMD redesigned this part of the instruction set for RDNA4 and made it much more fine-grained. We now have a lot more of these counters.

  • LOADcnt counts the number of vector loads issued but not yet completed, similar to the first part of VM_CNT.

  • STOREcnt counts the number of vector stores issued but not yet completed, similar to the second part of VM_CNT.

  • SAMPLEcnt counts vector sample/gather/msaa/lod instructions issued but not yet completed, similar to the third part of VM_CNT.

  • DScnt counts the number of LDS instructions issued but not yet completed, equivalent to the first half of LGKM_CNT.

  • KMcnt counts the number of scalar loads and message sends issued but not yet completed, similar to the second half of LGKM_CNT.

  • EXPcnt counts the number of export or parameter loads outstanding, similar to EXP_CNT.

  • BVHcnt counts the number of vector memory BVH (raytracing) instructions issued but haven’t returned data yet. There’s obviously no GCN or CDNA equivalent since there’s raytracing hardware.

This means that RDNA4 has a lot more situations where it can avoid having to explicitly stall the core even though there is useful work to perform compared to GCN or CDNA prior to GFX1250.

And while this isn’t as big of a deal in compute tasks, in modern graphics tasks it does make a difference since for example you can issue texture reads far ahead and not have that block a regular memory load.

On GFX125x we don’t have the following graphics wait counts,

  • SAMPLEcnt doesn’t exist because there are no texture samplers.

  • EXPcnt doesn’t exist because there is no rasterizer.

  • BVHcnt doesn’t exist because there are no raytracing instructions.

But to compensate we get new ones that do not exist in RDNA4 at all,

  • ASYNCcnt, counts the number of outstanding asynchronous load and store instructions to LDS.

  • TENSORcnt, counts the number of outstanding tensor load and store instructions.

  • Xcnt, counts the number of memory operations that have not completed address translation yet and a wait here is required to be inserted before instructions that must not be retried in case of a page fault or similar.

The final one is either the most or the least interesting one to you, since it allows a simpler way to guarantee atomicity during XNACK replay.

It seems like a good improvement and AMD is catching up on features with both Hopper and Blackwell, hopefully that means that they can not only beat Nvidia in theoretical performance but also challenge the market leader in practical performance with MI455X and Helios.

sentences.zh: 在短短几天内，AMD 将在其 Advancing AI 活动中展示其全新的 MI400 系列数据中心加速器，但在该活动到来之前，我们认为尝试探知 LLVM 承诺的茶叶，看看我们能确定有关下一代 AMD 加速器的信息，将会很有趣。

blocks.html_en: LLVM currently has preliminary support for two new accelerators from AMD, under the codenames GFX1250 and GFX1251.

sentences.en: LLVM currently has preliminary support for two new accelerators from AMD, under the codenames GFX1250 and GFX1251.
sentences.zh: LLVM 目前初步支持 AMD 的两款新加速器，代号为 GFX1250 和 GFX1251。

blocks.html_en: GFX1250 is an accelerator chip oriented at the machine learning market called MI455X and will be what powers the Helios rack. While the GFX1251 is oriented at the HPC market, named the MI430X and is projected by AMD to deliver over 200 TFLOPs of native double-precision compute.

sentences.en: GFX1250 is an accelerator chip oriented at the machine learning market called MI455X and will be what powers the Helios rack.
sentences.zh: GFX1250 是一款面向机器学习市场的加速器芯片，名为 MI455X，将为 Helios 机架提供动力。

sentences.en: While the GFX1251 is oriented at the HPC market, named the MI430X and is projected by AMD to deliver over 200 TFLOPs of native double-precision compute.
sentences.zh: GFX1251 面向 HPC 市场，命名为 MI430X，AMD 预计可提供超过 200 TFLOP 的本机双精度计算。

blocks.html_en: We’ll focus on the GFX1250 for now though and save the GFX1251 for another day.

sentences.en: We’ll focus on the GFX1250 for now though and save the GFX1251 for another day.
sentences.zh: 不过，我们现在将重点关注 GFX1250，GFX1251 改天再说。

blocks.html_en: We’ll compare the architecture to the consumer variant, the previous generation of CDNA accelerators, and to some extent Nvidia’s Blackwell.

sentences.en: We’ll compare the architecture to the consumer variant, the previous generation of CDNA accelerators, and to some extent Nvidia’s Blackwell.
sentences.zh: 我们将该架构与消费者版本、上一代 CDNA 加速器以及某种程度上 Nvidia 的 Blackwell 进行比较。

blocks.html_en: A curious note here is that while we know that these accelerators are not APUs, they are listed as such in LLVM.

sentences.en: A curious note here is that while we know that these accelerators are not APUs, they are listed as such in LLVM.
sentences.zh: 这里需要注意的是，虽然我们知道这些加速器不是 APU，但它们在 LLVM 中被列为 APU。

blocks.html_en: The biggest similarity with the consumer architectures is that we now have a WGP (Workgroup Processor) that are built up from two pairs of two SIMD32 arrays, but there is also four SIMDs per CU just like there was in GCN and CDNA. This seeming discrepancy is because there is no longer any need for the software to separate the two CUs in the WGP and AMD seems to use the terms interchangeably.

sentences.en: The biggest similarity with the consumer architectures is that we now have a WGP (Workgroup Processor) that are built up from two pairs of two SIMD32 arrays, but there is also four SIMDs per CU just like there was in GCN and CDNA.
sentences.zh: 与消费级架构最大的相似之处在于，我们现在有一个 WGP（工作组处理器），它由两对两个 SIMD32 阵列构建而成，但每个 CU 也有四个 SIMD，就像 GCN 和 CDNA 中一样。

sentences.en: This seeming discrepancy is because there is no longer any need for the software to separate the two CUs in the WGP and AMD seems to use the terms interchangeably.
sentences.zh: 这种看似差异的原因是软件不再需要在 WGP 中分离两个 CU，而且 AMD 似乎可以互换使用这些术语。

blocks.html_en: This “change” is probably not as structural as it might at first seem and might not even exist in hardware, the changes in the caching hierarchy simply makes the distinction pointless for the compiler as there is now a shared vector L0 cache for the whole WGP.

sentences.en: This “change” is probably not as structural as it might at first seem and might not even exist in hardware, the changes in the caching hierarchy simply makes the distinction pointless for the compiler as there is now a shared vector L0 cache for the whole WGP.
sentences.zh: 这种“变化”可能并不像乍一看那样是结构性的，甚至可能不存在于硬件中，缓存层次结构的变化只是使编译器的区别变得毫无意义，因为现在整个 WGP 有一个共享向量 L0 缓存。

blocks.html_en: GFX1250 operates only in Wave32 mode, unlike RDNA that can run in Wave64 in addition to Wave32 mode. Prior CDNA GPUs can only run in Wave64 mode and we can expect to see some oddness there from a performance engineering point of view when porting things to the new accelerators and a lot of kernels will have to be re-evaluated for the new architecture.

sentences.en: GFX1250 operates only in Wave32 mode, unlike RDNA that can run in Wave64 in addition to Wave32 mode.
sentences.zh: GFX1250只能运行在Wave32模式下，不像RDNA除了Wave32模式之外还可以运行在Wave64模式下。

sentences.en: Prior CDNA GPUs can only run in Wave64 mode and we can expect to see some oddness there from a performance engineering point of view when porting things to the new accelerators and a lot of kernels will have to be re-evaluated for the new architecture.
sentences.zh: 之前的 CDNA GPU 只能在 Wave64 模式下运行，从性能工程的角度来看，当将东西移植到新的加速器时，我们可以预期会看到一些奇怪的情况，并且必须针对新架构重新评估许多内核。

blocks.html_en: It also seems like GFX1250 can run 20 waves per SIMD, which is four more than RDNA4 can do.

sentences.en: It also seems like GFX1250 can run 20 waves per SIMD, which is four more than RDNA4 can do.
sentences.zh: GFX1250 似乎每个 SIMD 可以运行 20 波，比 RDNA4 多 4 波。

blocks.html_en: We do not know if any of these characteristics are a sign for where AMD goes on their GPUs, but I personally guess that it is a sign of times to come and a future generation of AMD GPUs will be locked to Wave32 and the “WGP” as it currently exist goes the way of the dodo but it seems like this is not happening anytime soon.

sentences.en: We do not know if any of these characteristics are a sign for where AMD goes on their GPUs, but I personally guess that it is a sign of times to come and a future generation of AMD GPUs will be locked to Wave32 and the “WGP” as it currently exist goes the way of the dodo but it seems like this is not happening anytime soon.
sentences.zh: 我们不知道这些特征是否预示着AMD在GPU上的发展方向，但我个人认为这是未来时代的标志，下一代AMD GPU将锁定Wave32，而目前存在的“WGP”将走向渡渡鸟，但似乎这种情况不会很快发生。

blocks.html_en: Similarly to RDNA4 we now get “WMMA” support, unlike the older “MFMA” featured in CDNA and this is where most of the machine learning capabilities of the GFX1250 will come from and we’ll look into it more later.

sentences.en: Similarly to RDNA4 we now get “WMMA” support, unlike the older “MFMA” featured in CDNA and this is where most of the machine learning capabilities of the GFX1250 will come from and we’ll look into it more later.
sentences.zh: 与 RDNA4 类似，我们现在获得“WMMA”支持，与 CDNA 中较旧的“MFMA”功能不同，这是 GFX1250 的大部分机器学习功能的来源，我们稍后会详细研究。

blocks.html_en: The dynamic VGPR allocation feature that was heavily touted in RDNA4 is missing, which is a bit strange to me since I would imagine it is even more important for machine learning workloads that are under much higher register pressure due to working with whole tensors instead of just individual vectors or matrices. The mode-switch is still there but the instruction to allocate new registers is documented as a no-op.

sentences.en: The dynamic VGPR allocation feature that was heavily touted in RDNA4 is missing, which is a bit strange to me since I would imagine it is even more important for machine learning workloads that are under much higher register pressure due to working with whole tensors instead of just individual vectors or matrices.
sentences.zh: RDNA4 中大力吹捧的动态 VGPR 分配功能缺失了，这对我来说有点奇怪，因为我认为它对于机器学习工作负载来说更为重要，因为机器学习工作负载由于使用整个张量而不是单个向量或矩阵而承受更高的寄存器压力。

sentences.en: The mode-switch is still there but the instruction to allocate new registers is documented as a no-op.
sentences.zh: 模式开关仍然存在，但分配新寄存器的指令被记录为无操作。

blocks.html_en: One of the largest changes found in GFX125X is that each wave in a SIMD can now address up to 1024 Vector General Purpose Registers (VGPRs) from the Register File. This is a major improvement over prior CDNA generations where you had a split allocation of registers with up to 256 VGPRs and 256 Accumulation VGPRs, which can only be used by the matrix units, for a total of up to 512 registers allocated to a single wave at a time.

sentences.en: One of the largest changes found in GFX125X is that each wave in a SIMD can now address up to 1024 Vector General Purpose Registers (VGPRs) from the Register File.
sentences.zh: GFX125X 中最大的变化之一是 SIMD 中的每个波形现在可以从寄存器文件中寻址最多 1024 个矢量通用寄存器 (VGPR)。

sentences.en: This is a major improvement over prior CDNA generations where you had a split allocation of registers with up to 256 VGPRs and 256 Accumulation VGPRs, which can only be used by the matrix units, for a total of up to 512 registers allocated to a single wave at a time.
sentences.zh: 这是相对于前几代 CDNA 的重大改进，在前几代 CDNA 中，您可以分割分配最多 256 个 VGPR 和 256 个累积 VGPR 的寄存器，这些寄存器只能由矩阵单元使用，一次分配给单个波形的寄存器总数最多为 512 个。

blocks.html_en: This is an even larger improvement over the register allocation behavior of the RDNA series of GPUs, RDNA can only allocate up to 256 registers to a single Wave with no allocation split. This is a major update that might at some point be part of a future generation GPU IP but I wouldn’t bet on it coming soon. We will just have to wait to see if the feature is going to stay locked to the Instinct line or if this ability to allocate up to 1024 registers to a single wave will make an appearance in the Radeon line up as well.

sentences.en: This is an even larger improvement over the register allocation behavior of the RDNA series of GPUs, RDNA can only allocate up to 256 registers to a single Wave with no allocation split.
sentences.zh: 这相对于 RDNA 系列 GPU 的寄存器分配行为来说是一个更大的改进，RDNA 最多只能将 256 个寄存器分配给单个 Wave，而无需进行分配分割。

sentences.en: This is a major update that might at some point be part of a future generation GPU IP but I wouldn’t bet on it coming soon.
sentences.zh: 这是一个重大更新，可能在某个时候成为下一代 GPU IP 的一部分，但我不认为它很快就会到来。

sentences.en: We will just have to wait to see if the feature is going to stay locked to the Instinct line or if this ability to allocate up to 1024 registers to a single wave will make an appearance in the Radeon line up as well.
sentences.zh: 我们只需要等待，看看该功能是否会锁定在 Instinct 系列中，或者这种为单个波形分配多达 1024 个寄存器的功能是否也会出现在 Radeon 系列中。

blocks.html_en: The maximum addressable local memory (LDS) is now 320kB per wavefront which is twice as much as CDNA4 and dwarfs the 64kB addressable in RDNA. But the actual LDS can actually be even larger, a major change in GFX125X is the merging of the LDS and vector L0 caches into what AMD is calling the WGP Cache (WGP$). While both nVidia and Intel have had a single structure for both cache and shared memory for a long time, AMD has been the odd vendor out with a split cache and LDS. GFX1250 now has a single 448KB structure that can be broken up into different allocations depending on what the compiler or programmer requests.

sentences.en: The maximum addressable local memory (LDS) is now 320kB per wavefront which is twice as much as CDNA4 and dwarfs the 64kB addressable in RDNA.
sentences.zh: 现在，每个波前的最大可寻址本地内存 (LDS) 为 320kB，是 CDNA4 的两倍，使 RDNA 中的 64kB 可寻址相形见绌。

sentences.en: But the actual LDS can actually be even larger, a major change in GFX125X is the merging of the LDS and vector L0 caches into what AMD is calling the WGP Cache (WGP$).
sentences.zh: 但实际的 LDS 实际上可以更大，GFX125X 的一个主要变化是将 LDS 和矢量 L0 缓存合并到 AMD 所称的 WGP 缓存 (WGP$) 中。

sentences.en: While both nVidia and Intel have had a single structure for both cache and shared memory for a long time, AMD has been the odd vendor out with a split cache and LDS.
sentences.zh: 虽然 nVidia 和 Intel 长期以来都采用单一的缓存和共享内存结构，但 AMD 却是采用分离式缓存和 LDS 的奇怪供应商。

sentences.en: GFX1250 now has a single 448KB structure that can be broken up into different allocations depending on what the compiler or programmer requests.
sentences.zh: GFX1250 现在具有单个 448KB 结构，可以根据编译器或程序员的要求分为不同的分配。

blocks.html_en: GFX1250 still supports packed fp32 operations allowing a single lane in the SIMD to process two fp32 operations at once just like CDNA2 and later, this practically means that when using packed instructions it has twice the vector width of RDNA.

sentences.en: GFX1250 still supports packed fp32 operations allowing a single lane in the SIMD to process two fp32 operations at once just like CDNA2 and later, this practically means that when using packed instructions it has twice the vector width of RDNA.
sentences.zh: GFX1250 仍然支持打包 fp32 操作，允许 SIMD 中的单个通道同时处理两个 fp32 操作，就像 CDNA2 及更高版本一样，这实际上意味着在使用打包指令时，它的向量宽度是 RDNA 的两倍。

blocks.html_en: It also inherits the more numerous and powerful SDMA units from CDNA.

sentences.en: It also inherits the more numerous and powerful SDMA units from CDNA.
sentences.zh: 它还继承了 CDNA 中数量更多、功能更强大的 SDMA 单元。

blocks.html_en: It is notable that nVidia and Intel do have some vestigial graphics hardware left on their accelerators and GFX125x differs a little from their offerings on this front.

sentences.en: It is notable that nVidia and Intel do have some vestigial graphics hardware left on their accelerators and GFX125x differs a little from their offerings on this front.
sentences.zh: 值得注意的是，nVidia 和 Intel 的加速器上确实留下了一些残留的图形硬件，而 GFX125x 与他们在这方面的产品略有不同。

blocks.html_en: • No export instructions and therefore no rasterizer (like CDNA)

sentences.en: No export instructions and therefore no rasterizer (like CDNA)
sentences.zh: 没有导出指令，因此没有光栅器（如 CDNA）

blocks.html_en: No export instructions and therefore no rasterizer (like CDNA)

sentences.en: No export instructions and therefore no rasterizer (like CDNA)
sentences.zh: 没有导出指令，因此没有光栅器（如 CDNA）

blocks.html_en: • No image (texture) instructions (like CDNA)

sentences.en: No image (texture) instructions (like CDNA)
sentences.zh: 无图像（纹理）说明（如 cDNA）

blocks.html_en: No image (texture) instructions (like CDNA)

sentences.en: No image (texture) instructions (like CDNA)
sentences.zh: 无图像（纹理）说明（如 cDNA）

blocks.html_en: • No BVH (raytracing) instructions (like CDNA)

sentences.en: No BVH (raytracing) instructions (like CDNA)
sentences.zh: 没有 BVH（光线追踪）指令（如 CDNA）

blocks.html_en: No BVH (raytracing) instructions (like CDNA)

sentences.en: No BVH (raytracing) instructions (like CDNA)
sentences.zh: 没有 BVH（光线追踪）指令（如 CDNA）

blocks.html_en: • No vector parameter interpolation instructions that are used to access and interpolate vertex data in pixel shaders (like CDNA)

sentences.en: No vector parameter interpolation instructions that are used to access and interpolate vertex data in pixel shaders (like CDNA)
sentences.zh: 没有用于在像素着色器中访问和插值顶点数据的矢量参数插值指令（如 CDNA）

blocks.html_en: No vector parameter interpolation instructions that are used to access and interpolate vertex data in pixel shaders (like CDNA)

sentences.en: No vector parameter interpolation instructions that are used to access and interpolate vertex data in pixel shaders (like CDNA)
sentences.zh: 没有用于在像素着色器中访问和插值顶点数据的矢量参数插值指令（如 CDNA）

blocks.html_en: • No MTBUF (typed buffer) instructions are supported (unlike CDNA and RDNA3)

sentences.en: No MTBUF (typed buffer) instructions are supported (unlike CDNA and RDNA3)
sentences.zh: 不支持 MTBUF（类型化缓冲区）指令（与 CDNA 和 RDNA3 不同）

blocks.html_en: No MTBUF (typed buffer) instructions are supported (unlike CDNA and RDNA3)

sentences.en: No MTBUF (typed buffer) instructions are supported (unlike CDNA and RDNA3)
sentences.zh: 不支持 MTBUF（类型化缓冲区）指令（与 CDNA 和 RDNA3 不同）

blocks.html_en: • No MUBUF (untyped buffer) instructions are supported (unlike CDNA and RDNA)

sentences.en: No MUBUF (untyped buffer) instructions are supported (unlike CDNA and RDNA)
sentences.zh: 不支持 MUBUF（无类型缓冲区）指令（与 CDNA 和 RDNA 不同）

blocks.html_en: No MUBUF (untyped buffer) instructions are supported (unlike CDNA and RDNA)

sentences.en: No MUBUF (untyped buffer) instructions are supported (unlike CDNA and RDNA)
sentences.zh: 不支持 MUBUF（无类型缓冲区）指令（与 CDNA 和 RDNA 不同）

blocks.html_en: • No LDS parameter and parameter direct loads (like CDNA)

sentences.en: No LDS parameter and parameter direct loads (like CDNA)
sentences.zh: 无LDS参数和参数直接加载（如CDNA）

blocks.html_en: No LDS parameter and parameter direct loads (like CDNA)

blocks.html_en: We’re seeing that this GFX125x is even more of a pure compute accelerator than even prior CDNA architectures with nearly all graphics features having been removed. This probably saves a little bit of die space and removes features no one will miss, so it makes a lot of sense to me.

sentences.en: We’re seeing that this GFX125x is even more of a pure compute accelerator than even prior CDNA architectures with nearly all graphics features having been removed.
sentences.zh: 我们看到，这款 GFX125x 甚至比之前的 CDNA 架构更像是一个纯粹的计算加速器，几乎所有图形功能都已被删除。

sentences.en: This probably saves a little bit of die space and removes features no one will miss, so it makes a lot of sense to me.
sentences.zh: 这可能会节省一点芯片空间并删除任何人都不会错过的功能，所以这对我来说很有意义。

blocks.html_en: The headline feature of the MI455X is its AI capabilities, and the tensor units are what powers that. This seems to be a best of both worlds situation where AMD is combining the simpler programming model from RDNA4 with the higher performance and capabilities of CDNA4.

sentences.en: The headline feature of the MI455X is its AI capabilities, and the tensor units are what powers that.
sentences.zh: MI455X 的主要特点是其 AI 功能，而张量单元正是其动力所在。

sentences.en: This seems to be a best of both worlds situation where AMD is combining the simpler programming model from RDNA4 with the higher performance and capabilities of CDNA4.
sentences.zh: 这似乎是两全其美的情况，AMD 将 RDNA4 的更简单编程模型与 CDNA4 的更高性能和功能相结合。

blocks.html_en: On RDNA4 WMMA operations are M = N = K = 16 (matrices are 16x16) except for the 4-bit ones that have K = 32 (arguments are 16x32 or 32x16 and accumulated into 16x16).

sentences.en: On RDNA4 WMMA operations are M = N = K = 16 (matrices are 16x16) except for the 4-bit ones that have K = 32 (arguments are 16x32 or 32x16 and accumulated into 16x16).
sentences.zh: 在 RDNA4 WMMA 上，除了 K = 32 的 4 位矩阵（参数为 16x32 或 32x16 并累加为 16x16）之外，WMMA 运算为 M = N = K = 16（矩阵为 16x16）。

blocks.html_en: GFX1250 keeps M = N = 16, but K instead is the same as it was on CDNA4. K = 4 for 64-bit and 32-bit floating-point elements, K = 32 for floating-point 16-bit elements, K = 64 for fixed-point 8-bit elements and K = 128 for floating-point 8-bit elements. Interestingly the i4 operations stay at RDNA4 level at K=32 and are no longer a very popular data format in large AI inference scenarios due to the adoption of MX floating point operations.

sentences.en: GFX1250 keeps M = N = 16, but K instead is the same as it was on CDNA4.
sentences.zh: GFX1250 保持 M = N = 16，但 K 与 CDNA4 上的相同。

sentences.en: K = 4 for 64-bit and 32-bit floating-point elements, K = 32 for floating-point 16-bit elements, K = 64 for fixed-point 8-bit elements and K = 128 for floating-point 8-bit elements.
sentences.zh: 对于 64 位和 32 位浮点元素，K = 4；对于浮点 16 位元素，K = 32；对于定点 8 位元素，K = 64；对于浮点 8 位元素，K = 128。

sentences.en: Interestingly the i4 operations stay at RDNA4 level at K=32 and are no longer a very popular data format in large AI inference scenarios due to the adoption of MX floating point operations.
sentences.zh: 有趣的是，i4 运算在 K=32 时仍停留在 RDNA4 级别，并且由于采用 MX 浮点运算，不再是大型 AI 推理场景中非常流行的数据格式。

blocks.html_en: Unlike on RDNA4 the sparse versions of WMMA seem to do less work per instruction than the dense ones by keeping K the same.

sentences.en: Unlike on RDNA4 the sparse versions of WMMA seem to do less work per instruction than the dense ones by keeping K the same.
sentences.zh: 与 RDNA4 不同，通过保持 K 相同，WMMA 的稀疏版本似乎比密集版本在每条指令上完成的工作更少。

blocks.html_en: RDNA4 supports the following matrix of formats for WMMA

sentences.en: RDNA4 supports the following matrix of formats for WMMA
sentences.zh: RDNA4 支持以下 WMMA 格式矩阵

blocks.html_en: While CDNA4 supports the following for MFMA

sentences.en: While CDNA4 supports the following for MFMA
sentences.zh: 虽然 CDNA4 支持 MFMA 以下内容

blocks.html_en: And GFX1250 seems to support all the datatypes that are found on both CDNA4 and RDNA4 except for fp64 which seems to be restricted to GFX1251, including the support of OCP MX-style scaling that was previously available solely on CDNA4.

sentences.en: And GFX1250 seems to support all the datatypes that are found on both CDNA4 and RDNA4 except for fp64 which seems to be restricted to GFX1251, including the support of OCP MX-style scaling that was previously available solely on CDNA4.
sentences.zh: GFX1250 似乎支持 CDNA4 和 RDNA4 上发现的所有数据类型（fp64 似乎仅限于 GFX1251），包括以前仅在 CDNA4 上提供的 OCP MX 式缩放的支持。

blocks.html_en: In addition there’s new instructions that allow you to transpose submatrices in LDS to complement the ones already in RNDA4. The fp4/fp6 versions of these have their own feature flag, that might be a sign that these will show up on consumer GPUs or it is just a coincidence.

sentences.en: In addition there’s new instructions that allow you to transpose submatrices in LDS to complement the ones already in RNDA4.
The fp4/fp6 versions of these have their own feature flag, that might be a sign that these will show up on consumer GPUs or it is just a coincidence.
sentences.zh: 这些的 fp4/fp6 版本有自己的功能标志，这可能表明这些将出现在消费者 GPU 上，或者这只是巧合。

blocks.html_en: This seems to be AMD’s version of “Thread Block Clusters” that nVidia introduced in their Hopper architecture, and it seems like they allow you to schedule a cluster to a specific shader engine and seems to be a feature that will be available on future graphics hardware too.

sentences.en: This seems to be AMD’s version of “Thread Block Clusters” that nVidia introduced in their Hopper architecture, and it seems like they allow you to schedule a cluster to a specific shader engine and seems to be a feature that will be available on future graphics hardware too.
sentences.zh: 这似乎是 nVidia 在其 Hopper 架构中引入的 AMD 版本的“线程块集群”，它们似乎允许您将集群调度到特定的着色器引擎，并且似乎也是未来图形硬件上可用的功能。

blocks.html_en: In addition to allowing you to access the cluster information, AMD has also introduced cluster-level loads which allow you to write to the LDS of other workgroups within a cluster, similar or equivalent to multicast loads on Nvidia hardware.

sentences.en: In addition to allowing you to access the cluster information, AMD has also introduced cluster-level loads which allow you to write to the LDS of other workgroups within a cluster, similar or equivalent to multicast loads on Nvidia hardware.
sentences.zh: 除了允许您访问集群信息之外，AMD 还引入了集群级负载，允许您写入集群内其他工作组的 LDS，类似于或等效于 Nvidia 硬件上的多播负载。

sentences.en: Author’s Note: A claim that wasn’t substantiated about DSMEM was removed here.
sentences.zh: 作者注：此处删除了有关 DSMEM 的未经证实的声明。

blocks.html_en: GFX1250 adds support for cluster-level barriers, which is a feature that is essentially required to make use of clusters and is equivalent to the Nvidia feature of the same name.

sentences.en: GFX1250 adds support for cluster-level barriers, which is a feature that is essentially required to make use of clusters and is equivalent to the Nvidia feature of the same name.
sentences.zh: GFX1250 增加了对集群级屏障的支持，这是使用集群所必需的功能，相当于 Nvidia 的同名功能。

blocks.html_en: In addition we’re getting intrinsics for barrier arrival, the equivalent of mbarrier.arrive in Nvidia PTX. AMD does seem to take this support one step further though by not just implementing barriers in hardware but also full monitors, allowing the wave to be notified if a specific cache line is evicted from the L2 cache.

sentences.en: In addition we’re getting intrinsics for barrier arrival, the equivalent of mbarrier.arrive in Nvidia PTX.
sentences.zh: 此外，我们还获得了屏障到达的内在函数，相当于 Nvidia PTX 中的 mbarrier.arrive。

sentences.en: AMD does seem to take this support one step further though by not just implementing barriers in hardware but also full monitors, allowing the wave to be notified if a specific cache line is evicted from the L2 cache.
sentences.zh: AMD 似乎确实在这一支持上更进一步，不仅在硬件中实现了屏障，而且还实现了完整的监视器，如果特定的缓存行被从 L2 缓存中逐出，则允许波得到通知。

blocks.html_en: It’s unclear what these exactly are intended to be useful for since Nvidia doesn’t have a direct equivalent already, but I guess GPU programmers will find a lot of good uses for these intrinsics.

sentences.en: It’s unclear what these exactly are intended to be useful for since Nvidia doesn’t have a direct equivalent already, but I guess GPU programmers will find a lot of good uses for these intrinsics.
sentences.zh: 目前还不清楚这些函数到底有什么用处，因为 Nvidia 还没有直接的等效项，但我猜 GPU 程序员会发现这些内在函数有很多很好的用途。

blocks.html_en: In addition to the split barriers and barrier objects already added in RDNA4, it also supports 16 named barrier objects. These are likely added as a compatibility thing, since they have been around since Nvidia’s Tesla architecture from 2006.

sentences.en: In addition to the split barriers and barrier objects already added in RDNA4, it also supports 16 named barrier objects.
sentences.zh: 除了RDNA4中已经添加的分割屏障和屏障对象外，它还支持16个命名屏障对象。

sentences.en: These are likely added as a compatibility thing, since they have been around since Nvidia’s Tesla architecture from 2006.
sentences.zh: 这些可能是作为兼容性而添加的，因为它们自 Nvidia 2006 年的 Tesla 架构以来就已经存在。

blocks.html_en: AMD is adding hardware support for tanh, which is rare in traditional geometry but very common in neural networks as an activation function and in the solution of many differential equations.

sentences.en: AMD is adding hardware support for tanh, which is rare in traditional geometry but very common in neural networks as an activation function and in the solution of many differential equations.
sentences.zh: AMD 正在增加对 tanh 的硬件支持，这在传统几何中很少见，但在神经网络中作为激活函数和许多微分方程的求解中非常常见。

blocks.html_en: But the whole unit seems to have been improved, they added bf16 support and the latency for fp32 operations have gone down from 9 cycles in RDNA4 to 8 cycles in GFX1250.

sentences.en: But the whole unit seems to have been improved, they added bf16 support and the latency for fp32 operations have gone down from 9 cycles in RDNA4 to 8 cycles in GFX1250.
sentences.zh: 但整个单元似乎得到了改进，他们添加了 bf16 支持，并且 fp32 操作的延迟从 RDNA4 中的 9 个周期下降到 GFX1250 中的 8 个周期。

blocks.html_en: With GFX1250 we now have intrinsics to do 32x4B, 16x8B, and 8x16B atomic loads and store to global memory, the funky naming is because these are actually 128B atomic loads and stores, the first number implies how many lanes of each wavefront are involved in the atomic but the result is essentially 1, 2, or 4 complete 128B atomic memory operations.

sentences.en: With GFX1250 we now have intrinsics to do 32x4B, 16x8B, and 8x16B atomic loads and store to global memory, the funky naming is because these are actually 128B atomic loads and stores, the first number implies how many lanes of each wavefront are involved in the atomic but the result is essentially 1, 2, or 4 complete 128B atomic memory operations.
sentences.zh: 借助 GFX1250，我们现在拥有执行 32x4B、16x8B 和 8x16B 原子加载并存储到全局内存的内在函数，这种时髦的命名是因为这些实际上是 128B 原子加载和存储，第一个数字表示每个波前有多少个通道参与原子操作，但结果本质上是 1、2 或 4 个完整的 128B 原子内存操作。

blocks.html_en: At the hardware-level they aren’t special instructions but just a sequence of regular loads or stores that the hardware knows how to handle so that they end up on the bus correctly.

sentences.en: At the hardware-level they aren’t special instructions but just a sequence of regular loads or stores that the hardware knows how to handle so that they end up on the bus correctly.
sentences.zh: 在硬件级别，它们不是特殊指令，而只是硬件知道如何处理的一系列常规加载或存储，以便它们最终正确地出现在总线上。

blocks.html_en: The first use-case for this that will pop into certain peoples minds is to use this to accelerate RPCS3’s Cell emulation, and while someone is obviously going to try and use it for that, there’s a bunch of use-cases for this. But a goal is likely to accelerate AMD’s equivalent to Nvidia’s Collective Communications Library (NCCL), creatively named ROCm Collective Communications Library, as explored in the paper Demystifying NCCL.

sentences.en: The first use-case for this that will pop into certain peoples minds is to use this to accelerate RPCS3’s Cell emulation, and while someone is obviously going to try and use it for that, there’s a bunch of use-cases for this.
sentences.zh: 某些人脑海中浮现的第一个用例是使用它来加速 RPCS3 的 Cell 模拟，虽然有人显然会尝试使用它来实现这一点，但有很多用例可以实现这一点。

sentences.en: But a goal is likely to accelerate AMD’s equivalent to Nvidia’s Collective Communications Library (NCCL), creatively named ROCm Collective Communications Library, as explored in the paper Demystifying NCCL.
sentences.zh: 但一个目标可能会加速 AMD 相当于 Nvidia 集体通信库 (NCCL) 的速度，创造性地将其命名为 ROCm 集体通信库，正如《揭秘 NCCL》一文中所探讨的那样。

blocks.html_en: LL128 support was to some extent already enabled on CDNA but the format has now been changed to be equivalent to the Nvidia one instead of splitting into two 64B halves.

sentences.en: LL128 support was to some extent already enabled on CDNA but the format has now been changed to be equivalent to the Nvidia one instead of splitting into two 64B halves.
sentences.zh: LL128 支持在某种程度上已经在 CDNA 上启用，但格式现已更改为与 Nvidia 格式相同，而不是分成两半 64B。

blocks.html_en: For technical reasons these operations are not available over PCIe but I assume these will be usable over CXL and UALink. Nvidia has a very similar limitation that it is only available in global memory or over NVLink.

sentences.en: For technical reasons these operations are not available over PCIe but I assume these will be usable over CXL and UALink.
sentences.zh: 由于技术原因，这些操作无法通过 PCIe 进行，但我认为这些操作可以通过 CXL 和 UALink 使用。

sentences.en: Nvidia has a very similar limitation that it is only available in global memory or over NVLink.
sentences.zh: Nvidia 有一个非常相似的限制，即它只能在全局内存中或通过 NVLink 可用。

blocks.html_en: Nvidia’s marketing name for this feature is the “Tensor Memory Accelerator”, and while this feature was already available to some extent in earlier CDNA iterations it has now gained more features especially related to tensors.

sentences.en: Nvidia’s marketing name for this feature is the “Tensor Memory Accelerator”, and while this feature was already available to some extent in earlier CDNA iterations it has now gained more features especially related to tensors.
sentences.zh: Nvidia 对此功能的营销名称是“张量内存加速器”，虽然此功能在早期 CDNA 迭代中已经在一定程度上可用，但现在它已经获得了更多功能，尤其是与张量相关的功能。

blocks.html_en: The basic version just allows you to load data from global memory into LDS without using the VGPRS.

sentences.en: The basic version just allows you to load data from global memory into LDS without using the VGPRS.
sentences.zh: 基本版本仅允许您将数据从全局内存加载到 LDS 中，而无需使用 VGPRS。

blocks.html_en: While it isn’t completely clear to me exactly what capabilities are available to the tensor version since the types involved are opaque, the code isn’t totally obvious and the documentation isn’t completely clear. But Triton has some good documentation where the capabilities are enumerated. It is somewhat similar to Nvidia’s tcgen05.cp in capability except they transfer between global memory and LDS instead of between shared memory and tensor memory.

sentences.en: While it isn’t completely clear to me exactly what capabilities are available to the tensor version since the types involved are opaque, the code isn’t totally obvious and the documentation isn’t completely clear.
sentences.zh: 虽然我并不完全清楚张量版本可以使用哪些功能，因为涉及的类型是不透明的，但代码并不完全明显，文档也不完全清晰。

sentences.en: But Triton has some good documentation where the capabilities are enumerated.
sentences.zh: 但 Triton 有一些很好的文档，其中列举了其功能。

sentences.en: It is somewhat similar to Nvidia’s tcgen05.cp in capability except they transfer between global memory and LDS instead of between shared memory and tensor memory.
sentences.zh: 它在功能上有点类似于 Nvidia 的 tcgen05.cp，只不过它们在全局内存和 LDS 之间传输，而不是在共享内存和张量内存之间传输。

blocks.html_en: GFX1250 adds explicit prefetching of vector memory, and AMD has finally added this feature that is available on many CPUs that are old enough to vote. Nvidia has supported this since Fermi so it really isn’t that exciting.

sentences.en: GFX1250 adds explicit prefetching of vector memory, and AMD has finally added this feature that is available on many CPUs that are old enough to vote.
sentences.zh: GFX1250 添加了矢量内存的显式预取，AMD 终于添加了此功能，该功能在许多足够老的 CPU 上都可用。

sentences.en: Nvidia has supported this since Fermi so it really isn’t that exciting.
sentences.zh: Nvidia 自 Fermi 以来就支持这一点，所以这确实不是那么令人兴奋。

blocks.html_en: Some people might think that this has been a curious omission for GPUs, but unlike CPUs we’re rarely starved for registers so we can load data early and we can use the many waves running on the same core to hide the latency.

sentences.en: Some people might think that this has been a curious omission for GPUs, but unlike CPUs we’re rarely starved for registers so we can load data early and we can use the many waves running on the same core to hide the latency.
sentences.zh: 有些人可能认为这对于 GPU 来说是一个奇怪的遗漏，但与 CPU 不同的是，我们很少缺乏寄存器，因此我们可以尽早加载数据，并且可以使用在同一核心上运行的许多波来隐藏延迟。

blocks.html_en: But I can imagine that inference kernels can gain some minor performance from this so it makes sense to add now I guess.

sentences.en: But I can imagine that inference kernels can gain some minor performance from this so it makes sense to add now I guess.
sentences.zh: 但我可以想象推理内核可以从中获得一些小的性能，所以我想现在添加是有意义的。

blocks.html_en: On AMD GPUs and accelerators the hardware can most of the time figure out data dependencies automatically, but in certain cases you need to do it manually.

sentences.en: On AMD GPUs and accelerators the hardware can most of the time figure out data dependencies automatically, but in certain cases you need to do it manually.
sentences.zh: 在 AMD GPU 和加速器上，硬件大多数时候可以自动找出数据依赖性，但在某些情况下您需要手动执行此操作。

blocks.html_en: On GCN and by extension CDNA you had three counters that allowed you to wait on operations to be completed so that you could ensure that previous operations had been completed before continuing.

sentences.en: On GCN and by extension CDNA you had three counters that allowed you to wait on operations to be completed so that you could ensure that previous operations had been completed before continuing.
sentences.zh: 在 GCN 和扩展的 CDNA 上，您拥有三个计数器，允许您等待操作完成，以便您可以确保先前的操作在继续之前已完成。

blocks.html_en:
• VM_CNT for vector memory operations.

    • Incremented when a vector-memory load is issued and decremented when the data is written to the VGPRs.

    • Incremented when a vector memory store is issued and decremented when the data is written to L2 cache.

    • Incremented when a sample or image instruction is issued and decremented when the data is returned to VGPRs.

blocks.html_en:
• LGKM_CNT for LDS, GDS, Konstant (scalar memory read), and Message instructions.

    • Incremented when a LDS or GDS load is issued and decremented when the data is written to the VGPRs.

    • Incremented when a LDS or GDS store is issued and decremented when the data is written to the LDS or GDS.

    • Incremented for every DWORD worth of scalar load issued and decremented again for every DWORD read from the scalar data cache (SMEM)

    • Incremented for every message send issued and decremented when the message is actually sent.

blocks.html_en: The big issue here with the GCN/CDNA setup of these counters is that instructions of different types are returned out-of-order. And in the case of scalar loads they are also returned out-of-order even within the same instruction type.

sentences.en: The big issue here with the GCN/CDNA setup of these counters is that instructions of different types are returned out-of-order.
sentences.zh: 这些计数器的 GCN/CDNA 设置的一个大问题是不同类型的指令乱序返回。

sentences.en: And in the case of scalar loads they are also returned out-of-order even within the same instruction type.
sentences.zh: 在标量加载的情况下，即使在相同的指令类型中，它们也会乱序返回。

blocks.html_en: This regretfully means that you are likely to need to insert more waits more than would otherwise be required, especially for scalar reads where waiting for the counter to reach zero is the only useful value.

sentences.en: This regretfully means that you are likely to need to insert more waits more than would otherwise be required, especially for scalar reads where waiting for the counter to reach zero is the only useful value.
sentences.zh: 遗憾的是，这意味着您可能需要插入比原本需要的更多的等待，特别是对于标量读取，其中等待计数器达到零是唯一有用的值。

blocks.html_en: So AMD redesigned this part of the instruction set for RDNA4 and made it much more fine-grained. We now have a lot more of these counters.

sentences.en: So AMD redesigned this part of the instruction set for RDNA4 and made it much more fine-grained.
sentences.zh: 所以AMD针对RDNA4重新设计了这部分指令集，并且使其粒度更加细化。

sentences.en: We now have a lot more of these counters.
sentences.zh: 我们现在有更多这样的计数器。

content_html_zh:
在短短几天内，AMD 将在其 Advancing AI 活动中展示其全新的 MI400 系列数据中心加速器，但在该活动到来之前，我们认为尝试探知 LLVM 承诺的茶叶，看看我们能确定有关下一代 AMD 加速器的信息，将会很有趣。

LLVM 目前初步支持 AMD 的两款新加速器，代号为 GFX1250 和 GFX1251。

GFX1250 是一款面向机器学习市场的加速器芯片，名为 MI455X，将为 Helios 机架提供动力。 GFX1251 面向 HPC 市场，命名为 MI430X，AMD 预计可提供超过 200 TFLOP 的本机双精度计算。

不过，我们现在将重点关注 GFX1250，GFX1251 改天再说。

我们将该架构与消费者版本、上一代 CDNA 加速器以及某种程度上 Nvidia 的 Blackwell 进行比较。

这里需要注意的是，虽然我们知道这些加速器不是 APU，但它们在 LLVM 中被列为 APU。

与消费级架构最大的相似之处在于，我们现在有一个 WGP（工作组处理器），它由两对两个 SIMD32 阵列构建而成，但每个 CU 也有四个 SIMD，就像 GCN 和 CDNA 中一样。 这种看似差异的原因是软件不再需要在 WGP 中分离两个 CU，而且 AMD 似乎可以互换使用这些术语。

这种“变化”可能并不像乍一看那样是结构性的，甚至可能不存在于硬件中，缓存层次结构的变化只是使编译器的区别变得毫无意义，因为现在整个 WGP 有一个共享向量 L0 缓存。

GFX1250只能运行在Wave32模式下，不像RDNA除了Wave32模式之外还可以运行在Wave64模式下。 之前的 CDNA GPU 只能在 Wave64 模式下运行，从性能工程的角度来看，当将东西移植到新的加速器时，我们可以预期会看到一些奇怪的情况，并且必须针对新架构重新评估许多内核。

GFX1250 似乎每个 SIMD 可以运行 20 波，比 RDNA4 多 4 波。

我们不知道这些特征是否预示着AMD在GPU上的发展方向，但我个人认为这是未来时代的标志，下一代AMD GPU将锁定Wave32，而目前存在的“WGP”将走向渡渡鸟，但似乎这种情况不会很快发生。

与 RDNA4 类似，我们现在获得“WMMA”支持，与 CDNA 中较旧的“MFMA”功能不同，这是 GFX1250 的大部分机器学习功能的来源，我们稍后会详细研究。

RDNA4 中大力吹捧的动态 VGPR 分配功能缺失了，这对我来说有点奇怪，因为我认为它对于机器学习工作负载来说更为重要，因为机器学习工作负载由于使用整个张量而不是单个向量或矩阵而承受更高的寄存器压力。 模式开关仍然存在，但分配新寄存器的指令被记录为无操作。

GFX125X 中最大的变化之一是 SIMD 中的每个波形现在可以从寄存器文件中寻址最多 1024 个矢量通用寄存器 (VGPR)。 这是相对于前几代 CDNA 的重大改进，在前几代 CDNA 中，您可以分割分配最多 256 个 VGPR 和 256 个累积 VGPR 的寄存器，这些寄存器只能由矩阵单元使用，一次分配给单个波形的寄存器总数最多为 512 个。

这相对于 RDNA 系列 GPU 的寄存器分配行为来说是一个更大的改进，RDNA 最多只能将 256 个寄存器分配给单个 Wave，而无需进行分配分割。 这是一个重大更新，可能在某个时候成为下一代 GPU IP 的一部分，但我不认为它很快就会到来。 我们只需要等待，看看该功能是否会锁定在 Instinct 系列中，或者这种为单个波形分配多达 1024 个寄存器的功能是否也会出现在 Radeon 系列中。

现在，每个波前的最大可寻址本地内存 (LDS) 为 320kB，是 CDNA4 的两倍，使 RDNA 中的 64kB 可寻址相形见绌。 但实际的 LDS 实际上可以更大，GFX125X 的一个主要变化是将 LDS 和矢量 L0 缓存合并到 AMD 所称的 WGP 缓存 (WGP$) 中。 虽然 nVidia 和 Intel 长期以来都采用单一的缓存和共享内存结构，但 AMD 却是采用分离式缓存和 LDS 的奇怪供应商。 GFX1250 现在具有单个 448KB 结构，可以根据编译器或程序员的要求分为不同的分配。

GFX1250 仍然支持打包 fp32 操作，允许 SIMD 中的单个通道同时处理两个 fp32 操作，就像 CDNA2 及更高版本一样，这实际上意味着在使用打包指令时，它的向量宽度是 RDNA 的两倍。

它还继承了 CDNA 中数量更多、功能更强大的 SDMA 单元。

值得注意的是，nVidia 和 Intel 的加速器上确实留下了一些残留的图形硬件，而 GFX125x 与他们在这方面的产品略有不同。

  • 没有导出指令，因此没有光栅器（如 CDNA）
  • 无图像（纹理）说明（如 cDNA）
  • 没有 BVH（光线追踪）指令（如 CDNA）
  • 没有用于在像素着色器中访问和插值顶点数据的矢量参数插值指令（如 CDNA）
  • 不支持 MTBUF（类型化缓冲区）指令（与 CDNA 和 RDNA3 不同）
  • 不支持 MUBUF（无类型缓冲区）指令（与 CDNA 和 RDNA 不同）
  • 无LDS参数和参数直接加载（如CDNA）

我们看到，这款 GFX125x 甚至比之前的 CDNA 架构更像是一个纯粹的计算加速器，几乎所有图形功能都已被删除。 这可能会节省一点芯片空间并删除任何人都不会错过的功能，所以这对我来说很有意义。

MI455X 的主要特点是其 AI 功能，而张量单元正是其动力所在。 这似乎是两全其美的情况，AMD 将 RDNA4 的更简单编程模型与 CDNA4 的更高性能和功能相结合。

在 RDNA4 WMMA 上，除了 K = 32 的 4 位矩阵（参数为 16x32 或 32x16 并累加为 16x16）之外，WMMA 运算为 M = N = K = 16（矩阵为 16x16）。

GFX1250 保持 M = N = 16，但 K 与 CDNA4 上的相同。 对于 64 位和 32 位浮点元素，K = 4；对于浮点 16 位元素，K = 32；对于定点 8 位元素，K = 64；对于浮点 8 位元素，K = 128。 有趣的是，i4 运算在 K=32 时仍停留在 RDNA4 级别，并且由于采用 MX 浮点运算，不再是大型 AI 推理场景中非常流行的数据格式。

与 RDNA4 不同，通过保持 K 相同，WMMA 的稀疏版本似乎比密集版本在每条指令上完成的工作更少。

虽然 CDNA4 支持 MFMA 以下内容

GFX1250 似乎支持 CDNA4 和 RDNA4 上发现的所有数据类型（fp64 似乎仅限于 GFX1251），包括以前仅在 CDNA4 上提供的 OCP MX 式缩放的支持。

In addition there’s new instructions that allow you to transpose submatrices in LDS to complement the ones already in RNDA4. 这些的 fp4/fp6 版本有自己的功能标志，这可能表明这些将出现在消费者 GPU 上，或者这只是巧合。

这似乎是 nVidia 在其 Hopper 架构中引入的 AMD 版本的“线程块集群”，它们似乎允许您将集群调度到特定的着色器引擎，并且似乎也是未来图形硬件上可用的功能。

除了允许您访问集群信息之外，AMD 还引入了集群级负载，允许您写入集群内其他工作组的 LDS，类似于或等效于 Nvidia 硬件上的多播负载。

作者注：此处删除了有关 DSMEM 的未经证实的声明。

GFX1250 增加了对集群级屏障的支持，这是使用集群所必需的功能，相当于 Nvidia 的同名功能。

此外，我们还获得了屏障到达的内在函数，相当于 Nvidia PTX 中的 mbarrier.arrive。 AMD 似乎确实在这一支持上更进一步，不仅在硬件中实现了屏障，而且还实现了完整的监视器，如果特定的缓存行被从 L2 缓存中逐出，则允许波得到通知。

目前还不清楚这些函数到底有什么用处，因为 Nvidia 还没有直接的等效项，但我猜 GPU 程序员会发现这些内在函数有很多很好的用途。

除了RDNA4中已经添加的分割屏障和屏障对象外，它还支持16个命名屏障对象。 这些可能是作为兼容性而添加的，因为它们自 Nvidia 2006 年的 Tesla 架构以来就已经存在。

AMD 正在增加对 tanh 的硬件支持，这在传统几何中很少见，但在神经网络中作为激活函数和许多微分方程的求解中非常常见。

但整个单元似乎得到了改进，他们添加了 bf16 支持，并且 fp32 操作的延迟从 RDNA4 中的 9 个周期下降到 GFX1250 中的 8 个周期。

借助 GFX1250，我们现在拥有执行 32x4B、16x8B 和 8x16B 原子加载并存储到全局内存的内在函数，这种时髦的命名是因为这些实际上是 128B 原子加载和存储，第一个数字表示每个波前有多少个通道参与原子操作，但结果本质上是 1、2 或 4 个完整的 128B 原子内存操作。

在硬件级别，它们不是特殊指令，而只是硬件知道如何处理的一系列常规加载或存储，以便它们最终正确地出现在总线上。

某些人脑海中浮现的第一个用例是使用它来加速 RPCS3 的 Cell 模拟，虽然有人显然会尝试使用它来实现这一点，但有很多用例可以实现这一点。 但一个目标可能会加速 AMD 相当于 Nvidia 集体通信库 (NCCL) 的速度，创造性地将其命名为 ROCm 集体通信库，正如《揭秘 NCCL》一文中所探讨的那样。

LL128 支持在某种程度上已经在 CDNA 上启用，但格式现已更改为与 Nvidia 格式相同，而不是分成两半 64B。

由于技术原因，这些操作无法通过 PCIe 进行，但我认为这些操作可以通过 CXL 和 UALink 使用。 Nvidia 有一个非常相似的限制，即它只能在全局内存中或通过 NVLink 可用。

Nvidia 对此功能的营销名称是“张量内存加速器”，虽然此功能在早期 CDNA 迭代中已经在一定程度上可用，但现在它已经获得了更多功能，尤其是与张量相关的功能。

基本版本仅允许您将数据从全局内存加载到 LDS 中，而无需使用 VGPRS。

虽然我并不完全清楚张量版本可以使用哪些功能，因为涉及的类型是不透明的，但代码并不完全明显，文档也不完全清晰。 但 Triton 有一些很好的文档，其中列举了其功能。 它在功能上有点类似于 Nvidia 的 tcgen05.cp，只不过它们在全局内存和 LDS 之间传输，而不是在共享内存和张量内存之间传输。

GFX1250 添加了矢量内存的显式预取，AMD 终于添加了此功能，该功能在许多足够老的 CPU 上都可用。 Nvidia 自 Fermi 以来就支持这一点，所以这确实不是那么令人兴奋。

有些人可能认为这对于 GPU 来说是一个奇怪的遗漏，但与 CPU 不同的是，我们很少缺乏寄存器，因此我们可以尽早加载数据，并且可以使用在同一核心上运行的许多波来隐藏延迟。

但我可以想象推理内核可以从中获得一些小的性能，所以我想现在添加是有意义的。

在 AMD GPU 和加速器上，硬件大多数时候可以自动找出数据依赖性，但在某些情况下您需要手动执行此操作。

在 GCN 和扩展的 CDNA 上，您拥有三个计数器，允许您等待操作完成，以便您可以确保先前的操作在继续之前已完成。

  • VM_CNT 用于向量内存操作。当发出向量内存加载时递增，当数据写入 VGPR 时递减。当发出向量内存存储时递增，当数据写入 L2 缓存时递减。当发出样本或图像指令时递增，当数据返回到 VGPR 时递减。
  • LGKM_CNT 用于 LDS、GDS、Konstant（标量内存读取）和消息指令。当发出 LDS 或 GDS 加载时递增，当数据写入 VGPR 时递减。当发出 LDS 或 GDS 存储时递增，当数据写入 LDS 或 GDS 时递减。对于发出的每个 DWORD 值的标量负载递增，对于从 VGPR 读取的每个 DWORD 值再次递减。标量数据缓存 (SMEM) 每次发送消息时递增，并在消息实际发送时递减。
  • EXP_CNT 用于 VGPR 导出，这是一种图形功能，用于在着色器之间传递顶点位置和颜色值等内容。 它存在于 cDNA 中但未使用，因此我们将方便地忽略此计数器

这些计数器的 GCN/CDNA 设置的一个大问题是不同类型的指令乱序返回。 在标量加载的情况下，即使在相同的指令类型中，它们也会乱序返回。

遗憾的是，这意味着您可能需要插入比原本需要的更多的等待，特别是对于标量读取，其中等待计数器达到零是唯一有用的值。

所以AMD针对RDNA4重新设计了这部分指令集，并且使其粒度更加细化。 我们现在有更多这样的计数器。

  • LOADcnt 统计已发出但尚未完成的向量加载的数量，类似于 VM_CNT 的第一部分。
  • STOREcnt 统计已发出但尚未完成的向量存储的数量，类似于 VM_CNT 的第二部分。
  • SAMPLEcnt 统计已发出但尚未完成的向量sample/gather/msaa/lod 指令，与VM_CNT 的第三部分类似。
  • DScnt 统计已发出但尚未完成的 LDS 指令的数量，相当于 LGKM_CNT 的前半部分。
  • KMcnt 计算已发出但尚未完成的标量加载和消息发送的数量，类似于 LGKM_CNT 的后半部分。
  • EXPcnt 计算未完成的导出或参数加载的数量，类似于 EXP_CNT。
  • BVHcnt 计算已发出但尚未返回数据的向量内存 BVH（光线跟踪）指令的数量。 由于有光线追踪硬件，显然没有 GCN 或 CDNA 等价物。

这意味着，与 GFX1250 之前的 GCN 或 CDNA 相比，即使需要执行有用的工作，RDNA4 在更多情况下也可以避免显式停止核心。

虽然这在计算任务中并不是什么大问题，但在现代图形任务中它确实会产生影响，因为例如您可以提前发出纹理读取而不需要阻止常规内存加载。

在 GFX125x 上，我们没有以下图形等待计数，

  • SAMPLEcnt 不存在，因为没有纹理采样器。
  • EXPcnt 不存在，因为没有光栅器。
  • BVHcnt 不存在，因为没有光线追踪指令。

但作为补偿，我们得到了 RDNA4 中根本不存在的新的，

  • ASYNCnt，计算 LDS 中未完成的异步加载和存储指令的数量。
  • TENSORcnt，计算未完成的张量加载和存储指令的数量。
  • Xcnt，计算尚未完成地址转换的内存操作的数量，并且需要在出现页面错误或类似情况时不得重试的指令之前插入等待。

最后一个对您来说要么是最有趣的，要么是最不有趣的，因为它提供了一种更简单的方法来保证 XNACK 重放期间的原子性。

这看起来是一个不错的改进，AMD 正在追赶 Hopper 和 Blackwell 的功能，希望这意味着他们不仅可以在理论性能上击败 Nvidia，而且可以通过 MI455X 和 Helios 在实际性能上挑战市场领导者。
